title: TISSUE: uncertainty-calibrated prediction of single-cell spatial transcriptomics improves downstream analyses.
author: Sun ED Ma R Navarro Negredo P Brunet A Zou J
content: S-EPMC10168375 PMC10168375 TISSUE: uncertainty-calibrated prediction of single-cell spatial transcriptomics improves downstream analyses.
